business_units.name: Misraj System
business_units.description: Everything you need for complete AI integration in one place.

business_units.name: Workforces
business_units.description: The first Arabic AI employee suite designed for enterprises and government institutions, providing AI agents capable of automating operations, customer service, compliance, and data analysis with a native understanding of Arabic.

business_units.name: Adam Platform
business_units.description: A fully integrated system specialized in da‘wah, guidance, and spiritual instruction.

business_units.name: Thka Platform
business_units.description: An integrated platform aimed at building Arab awareness and educating it on modern technology and contemporary innovations.

business_units.name: Kawn AI Ecosystem
business_units.description: Includes large language models, vision-language models, embedding models, and RAG pipelines designed to understand Arabic.

business_units.name: Enterprise Solutions
business_units.description: A range of solutions designed to aid businesses in digital transformation and process automation.

products_services.name: Baseer
products_services.description: A state-of-the-art Arabic document intelligence platform that converts complex Arabic PDFs and scans into structured, AI-ready data for enterprise automation and digital transformation; helps computers read scanned Arabic documents, converting them into clean, well-structured text.

products_services.name: SeamlessAPI
products_services.description: Provides developers an easy way to leverage Kawn for various tasks including translation and summarization.

products_services.name: Arabic Language Models
products_services.description: Advanced AI models specifically developed for the Arabic language, enabling deep understanding and generation of Arabic text.

products_services.name: LLM
products_services.description: Large Language Models, a core component of their AI offerings.

target_industries.name: Governments
target_industries.description: Enabling governments to use AI with confidence, depth, and speed; providing AI employee suites for government institutions.

target_industries.name: Enterprises
target_industries.description: Empowering businesses to embark on their journey of digital transformation and process automation; providing AI employee suites for enterprises.

target_industries.name: Technology Sector
target_industries.description: Focused on creating an integrated ecosystem that enables organizations to leverage AI.

strategic_initiatives.name: Baseer: Vision Language Model for Arabic Document to Markdown OCR
strategic_initiatives.description: Misraj’s Vision Language Model for Arabic Document to Markdown OCR, converting complex Arabic PDFs and scans into structured, AI-ready data.

strategic_initiatives.description: Exploring and developing advanced reinforcement learning techniques.

strategic_initiatives.name: Lahjawi Dialect Engine
strategic_initiatives.description: An AI engine capable of understanding more than a dozen Arabic dialects with high accuracy.

strategic_initiatives.name: Digital Transformation under Saudi Arabia’s Vision 2030
